purpose: Registry of provider-backed provisioning integration profiles used before cluster validation and application deployment.
governanceRules: Provisioning integration profiles are operational configuration artifacts and must not contain local Proxmox secrets.
Real provider execution must resolve a local or generated proxmox-k3s configuration file.
Dry-run execution may use redacted example files for review-only command planning.
Provider command logs and manifests must be written under the cycle-specific results tree.
Application deployment and workload execution must not start when provisioning integration fails.
Runtime campaign variants must be generated from provisioning templates rather than from concrete baseline profiles.

runtimeGeneratedProfilePolicy.rationale: Campaign-variant provisioning profiles are generated from the template to bind each infrastructure profile to its proxmox-k3s provider configuration and lifecycle policy.
runtimeGeneratedProfilePolicy.networkAwareSchedulerToolchainScope: C9 uses runtime-generated provider-backed profiles with proxmox-k3s v1.0.3 add-on support.
